mapper.select: SELECT planInfo.plan_id,planInfo.plan_title,planTypeItem.item_text AS plan_type, planInfo.user_id,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( userInfo.`name` ) FROM sys_user userInfo WHERE FIND_IN_SET( userInfo.user_id, planInfo.user_id )) AS `name`, planInfo.target_user,planInfo.plan_begin_time,planInfo.plan_end_time,planInfo.plan_place, planInfo.plan_content,userPlanInfo.user_id AS partake_user_id, partakeUser.`name` AS partake_user FROM t_plan_info planInfo LEFT JOIN t_dict_item planTypeItem ON planInfo.plan_type = planTypeItem.item_id LEFT JOIN t_user_plan_info userPlanInfo ON planInfo.plan_id = userPlanInfo.plan_id LEFT JOIN sys_user partakeUser ON userPlanInfo.user_id = partakeUser.user_id WHERE planInfo.plan_id =#{planId}
